'''Birrus''' were lacy-winged flying creatures, vulnerable to windstorms, that were native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
